
    A photorealistic, appetizing, and well-lit image of Orange Sponge Cake.
    Summary: Nathan,

I have this love of citrus desserts paired with different fruit textures and combined to make delicious treats. I found that it is a good versatile cake recipe and it is good to have for a nice spring tea party or a summer cake with sweetened whipped cream filling.I love you dearly.

Mom


    Ingredients: 6  large eggs, 1 ⅓ cups cake flour, 1 ½ cups sugar, ¼ teaspoon salt, ⅓ cup orange juice, 3 teaspoons grated orange zest, ¾ teaspoons cream of tartar, ⅓ cup butter, 2 cups confectioners sugar, 3 to 5 teaspoons water, 1 ½ teaspoons vanilla extract
    Tags: orange, cake, sweet, Christmas
    The image should be high quality and suitable for a recipe website.
    Do not include any letters or text in the image.
    Make sure the picture includes a garden gnome in it.
